audience.who: B2B PLG SaaS founders, Heads of Growth, and PMM leads
audience.segments: Developer tools, data platforms, collaboration SaaS

starting_situation: We had 3 polished PDF case studies and almost no in-product social proof. Trial-to-signup was 1.1% and D7 activation was 24%.
main_constraint: Lean GTM team of 5, no designer bandwidth, legal approval cycles slow for named logos.
business_goal: Drive warm DMs to recruit 6 design partner companies for our 'customer stories' pilot and share our SOP.
cta: DM "STORY" to join the pilot or get the SOP.
mechanism: Run 45-minute founder-led interviews with 12 customers to extract 10 micro-stories
Slice each story into 3 formats: in-product proof tile, onboarding email snippet, 1-slide deck insert
Ship weekly: add proof tiles into onboarding, rotate email snippets, and update the sales deck based on reply data
detail_that_changes_everything: Text-first, unbranded snippets placed inside the product beat polished PDFs on conversion.
insight: Fast, rough 'micro-stories' win over long case studies for PLG; social proof works best inside the product and onboarding emails.

costly_signals: I spent 42 hours across two weekends on interviews and edits
We paid $6,800 to incentivize customers and transcribe calls

constraints_risks: Legal approval limits named logos for 11 of 17 stories
No designer support; shipping text-first assets

can_share: Counts of stories and influenced deals

offer_details.pilot: 3-week sprint to extract and deploy 10 micro-stories
offer_details.requirements: Access to 8–12 customers and 5 user calls in week 1
offer_details.deliverables: SOP, 10 micro-stories, 12 proof tiles, email snippets, and deck inserts
offer_details.price: Pilot is free for 6 design partners; we ask for a testimonial if it works
